description_long: This bird features an olive-yellow back and wings, with a lighter yellowish underbelly and a distinct dark gray to black head. The head is marked by a white patch on the cheek and a thin white line above the eye, giving it a striking facial pattern. The beak is slender and pointed, well-suited for insectivorous or nectar-feeding habits. The wings are compact and the tail is relatively short and slightly rounded, blending seamlessly with the body. The legs are short and appear to be a muted gray or brown color. The plumage is smooth and closely fitted, with subtle gradients between the darker and lighter areas.
description: A small bird with olive-yellow wings and back, a dark head with white facial markings, and a slender pointed beak. The plumage is smooth with subtle color gradients and a slightly rounded tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the olive-yellow back, dark head, and white cheek patch, with the slender beak clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the compact wings, short tail, and the overall streamlined body shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the same color pattern and facial markings visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pointed beak, white facial markings, and the symmetry of the head and body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid olive-yellow back and wings, dark head with white cheek patch, subtle gradients on underparts
